mapper.select: SELECT * FROM nav WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY nav_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nav ( product_id, nav_date, nav, acc_nav, daily_return, dividend, source, created_at ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{navDate}, #{nav}, #{accNav}, #{dailyReturn}, #{dividend}, #{source}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE nav = VALUES(nav), acc_nav = VALUES(acc_nav), daily_return = VALUES(daily_return), dividend = VALUES(dividend)
